LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_11.english: And like you, I, who hate humans more than anyone.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_11.korean: 그리고 너처럼, 누구보다 인간을 싫어하고 있는 나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_15.english: Right… I hate humans too… because all humans hate me…
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_15.korean: 맞아… 나도 인간이 싫어…&n인간들은 모두 날 미워하니까…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_16.english: So I hate humans so much…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_17.english: Right. You and I are exactly the same.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_18.english: So, people who dislike... have no need to exist.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_18.korean: 그러니까 싫어하는 인간들은… 존재할 필요가 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_19.english: Because humans took away our happiness.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_20.english: We have to take everything, too. Everything… from this world.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_20.korean: 우리도 전부 빼앗아야 해.&n이 세상에서… 전부.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_22.english: Now, take my hand. Together, we are going to take everything from humans.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_22.korean: 자, 내 손을 잡아.&n나와 함께 인간들에게서 모든 걸 빼앗는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_25.english: Ah… a voice…? Who is it…?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_28.english: What's wrong? Aren't you going to hold my hand?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_30.english: I definitely hate humans so much…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_32.english: Still... Hela became my friend. There was someone who became my friend.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_32.korean: 그래도… 헬라 언니는 나랑 친구가 돼줬어.&n나랑 친구가 돼주는 인간이 있었어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_33.english: ...It's just one person. You're saying you won't hate humans just because of that one person?
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_33.korean: ...겨우 한 사람일 뿐이야.&n그 한 사람 때문에 인간을 미워하지 않겠다고?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_34.english: I feel so stupid! You never know when you might be abandoned again!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_34.korean: 바보 같아! 언제 또 버림받을지도 모르잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_35.english: Even though there is only one person… even if I am abandoned again…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_36.english: Still… I want to make a friend again!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_36.korean: 그래도… 다시 한 번, 친구를 만들고 싶어!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_4.english: For me, everyone… has an inspiration…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_40.english: You might end up coming back here again.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_40.korean: 다시 이곳으로 돌아오게 될 수도 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_41.english: That might not be the case.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_45.english: Are you okay? Are you hurt anywhere?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_47.english: Yes! Me and… Burning Black came together to rescue Stella!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_47.korean: 네! 저랑 그… 버닝 블랙도 같이 스텔라를 구해주러 왔어요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_48.english: Ah… it’s true. Burning Black is safe…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_51.english: I… want to be friends with Hela.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_51.korean: 나… 헬라 언니랑 친구가 되고 싶어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_52.english: Of course! Stella and I are already friends!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_53.english: Ah, of course, Burning Black is a friend too!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_54.english: Hehehe… Yeah! Hela and Burning Black… they’re all my friends.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_54.korean: 에헤헤… 응! 헬라 언니도, 버닝 블랙도… 모두 다 내 친구야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_55.english: … It seems to be resolved well.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_56.english: I think I should express my gratitude to you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_56.korean: 당신에겐 감사의 말을 전해야 할 것 같습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_57.english: If it weren't for you, I would have been hostile toward Stella Unibel as a Desire Worker to the very end.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_57.korean: 당신이 아니었다면, 저는 스텔라 유니벨을 끝까지 데자이어 워커로서 적대했을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_58.english: I probably would never have been able to see that child smiling like that again.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_58.korean: 저 아이가 저렇게 웃는 모습을… 다시는 볼 수 없었겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_59.english: If that had happened… I might have lived my entire life regretting this.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_59.korean: 그랬다면… 저는 이 일을 평생 후회하며 살았을지도 모릅니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_6.english: Even if I stay alone… I’m not lonely…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_60.english: … I see. It might not be the case anymore.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_61.english: - A bright smile bloomed on Stella's face.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_61.korean: - 스텔라의 얼굴에는 밝은 웃음 피어 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_63.english: - But at the end, laughter always awaits.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_63.korean: - 하지만 그 끝에는 언제나 웃음이 기다리고 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_67.english: Player: Commander Character: Stella Unibel Ending Branch: Achieved.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_67.korean: 플레이어 : 사령관&n인물 : 스텔라 유니벨&n엔딩 분기 : 달성 완료.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_68.english: Permission to view the following records.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_7.english: Really? Even if you stay alone... aren't you really lonely?
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_7.korean: 정말? 계속 혼자여도… 정말로 외롭지 않아?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_73.english: Start collecting clear data for the third record.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_73.korean: 세 번 째 기록의 클리어 데이터 수집을 시작합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_75.english: <Stella Unibel: Musical Ideas of Permeating Sorrow> END.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_76.english: To be continued in Part 2 of <The Defiled Last Record>.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10ED_78.english: But that's not the case anymore, is it?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_103.english: Those despicable humans… have come again.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_104.korean: 이제 두 번 다시… 인간을 믿지 않겠다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_105.english: Did that giant spirit… possess Stella’s body?
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_105.korean: 그 거대한 혼령이… 스텔라의 몸을 차지한 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_106.english: Old man…! Why… do you… want to talk to Stella…!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_108.english: I won't let that child go through the same pain again.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_108.korean: 그 아이에게 또다시 같은 아픔을… 겪게 하진 않겠다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_109.english: - Damn it… Is it already too late? Failed again… Do I have to start over from the beginning?
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_109.korean: - 젠장… 이미 늦었나?&n이번에도 실패고… 처음부터 다시 해야 하는 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_11.english: - I was able to hear a detailed account of what happened since Hela entered virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_11.korean: - 나는 헬라가 가상 현실에 들어온 이후로 무슨 일이 있었는지 자세한 이야기를 들을 수 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_110.english: - There is no way to… turn back Stella… who has become a Desire Walker…
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_110.korean: - 데자이어 워커가 된 스텔라를… 되돌릴 방법이…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_111.english: Human... um... I'll try talking to Stella who is asleep.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_111.korean: 인간님… 저… 잠든 스텔라에게 말을 걸어볼게요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_112.english: I don't know if I can do it well... but if it's Stella... she will definitely listen to my voice.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_112.korean: 잘할 수 있을지는 모르겠지만…&n스텔라라면… 분명 제 목소리를 들어줄 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_114.english: I understand the situation. I'm not sure if it will succeed, but it seems worth a try.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_114.korean: 상황은 알겠습니다.&n성공할 수 있을 지 모르겠지만 시도해 볼 가치는 있겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_115.english: - I will definitely... end Stella's sorrow here.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_117.english: Only about an hour has passed.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_119.english: I heard that the child is holding you hostage.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_119.korean: 그 아이가 너를 인질로 데리고 있다고 들었거든.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_12.english: - The incident where I landed in a different place from myself and was attacked by Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_12.korean: - 나와는 다른 장소에 떨어졌고, 소울정크의 습격을 받은 일.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_121.english: There must have been a reason.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_125.english: Not a punishment for this incident…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_126.english: Punishment for your bad habit of thinking everything is your own fault.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_126.korean: 뭐든지 자기 잘못이라고 생각하는 네 나쁜 버릇에 대한 벌.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_128.english: So you don't need to make that face.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_128.korean: 그러니까 그런 표정을 지을 필요 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_129.english: What do you want to do, Hela?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_13.english: - The encounter with Stella, who commands a spirit called 'Old Man'.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_13.korean: - ‘영감님’이라 불리는 혼령을 부리는 스텔라와 만난 일.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_131.english: Of course I have to go find Stella, right?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_136.english: If you make a precious friend, wouldn't you protect and safeguard them from danger?
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_136.korean: 소중한 친구가 생기면 위험으로부터 지키고 보호하지 않겠어?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_138.english: I might have taken away a precious friend from that child and made them a loner.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_138.korean: 그 아이에게서 소중한 친구를 빼앗고, 외톨이로 만든 걸지도 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_139.english: I don't want to call that... justice.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_139.korean: 나는 그걸… 정의라고 말하고 싶지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_14.english: - And the story of how Hela and Stella became friends.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_14.korean: - 그리고 헬라와 스텔라, 두 사람이 친구가 된 이야기까지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_142.english: No, it seems like you're letting it go too easily.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_142.korean: 아니, 너무 쉽게 보내주는 것 같아서.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_143.english: I thought you would definitely stop me from going.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_143.korean: 너라면 분명 가지 못하게 막을 거라 생각했거든.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_144.english: I understand. I'll feel reassured if you come with me.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_144.korean: 알겠어. 네가 같이 가준다면 든든할 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_145.english: The problem is where Stella ran off to...

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_147.english: In that case… I can’t let it slide even more.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_15.english: So… I mistook them for bad people and ran away…
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_15.korean: 그래서… 저는 나쁜 사람들이라고 착각해서 도망쳤어요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_16.english: I'm sorry... If I had known you were a human, this wouldn't have happened...
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_16.korean: 죄송해요… 인간님이라는 걸 알았더라면 이런 일은 없었을 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_17.english: I'm so sorry... I'll accept any punishment... So, Stella...
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_17.korean: 정말 죄송해요… 어떤 벌이라도 받을게요… 그러니까 스텔라는…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_19.english: - I lightly tapped Hela's forehead with my finger.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_19.korean: - 나는 가볍게 손가락에 힘을 주어 헬라의 이마를 툭 쳤다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_23.english: I want to be with Stella!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_26.english: I told you I wouldn't be separated from Stella no matter what... I wouldn't let Stella be left alone...!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_26.korean: 무슨 일이 있어도 스텔라하고 떨어지지 않겠다고…&n스텔라를 혼자 두게 하지 않겠다고요…!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_27.english: The emotion sustaining me right now is…!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_28.english: Because it is the feeling that I will never again lose family and friends right before my eyes!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_28.korean: 다시는 가족과 친구를 눈 앞에서 잃지 않겠다는 감정이니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_29.english: What...? Now? Where are you going?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_3.english: M-Mr. Human...? Why are you here... I was so out of my mind...
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_3.korean: 인, 인간님…? 인간님이 왜 여기에… 저는 얼마나 정신을…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_33.english: I'm not entirely sure, but it looks like there are a lot of people at the camp here...
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_33.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만, 여기 캠프에 많은 사람들이 있는 것 같은데…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_34.english: Is it really okay to sneak out like this...?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_35.english: - There is the option of receiving help from the people in the camp, but it is not easy considering the perception of Desire Workers.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_35.korean: - 캠프 사람들에게 도움을 받는 선택지도 있지만, 데자이어 워커를 향한 인식을 생각하면 쉽지 않다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_36.english: - Furthermore, the protagonist of this stage is undoubtedly a child named Stella.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_36.korean: - 게다가 이번 스테이지의 주인공은 틀림없이 스텔라라는 아이가 분명하다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_37.english: - The priority is to stop that child before they fully awaken as a Desire Walker.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_37.korean: - 그 아이가 완전히 데자이어 워커로 각성하기 전에 막는 게 우선이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_38.english: What on earth is okay about it?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_39.english: It is problematic to act arbitrarily like this.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_39.korean: 이런 식으로 멋대로 행동하는 건 곤란합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_4.english: - I was worried about Hela, who had lost consciousness in virtual reality, but it seems she’s fine.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_4.korean: - 가상 현실에서 정신을 잃은 헬라의 상태가 걱정되었지만, 보아하니 큰 문제는 없는 것 같다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_40.english: - I was planning to sneak out, but did I get caught…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_41.english: M-Mr. Human... what should I do...?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_42.english: It looks like you are trying to find Desire Walker.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_42.korean: 아무래도 데자이어 워커를 찾아가려는 것 같군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_43.english: In that case, as the representative leading the camp, I must prevent actions that could cause harm to this place.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_43.korean: 그렇다면 저는 캠프를 이끄는 대표로서, 이곳에 피해를 줄 수 있는 행동을 막아야 합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_44.english: - Judging by Tenebris's expression, it didn't look like he was going to let us leave just like that.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_44.korean: - 테네브리스의 표정으로 보아, 우리를 그냥 보내줄 생각은 없어 보였다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_45.english: However, that child attacked people and took hostages.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_45.korean: 하지만 그 아이는 사람들을 공격했고, 인질을 잡았습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_50.english: … It does not matter what you think of me. I am simply realizing the justice I believe in, just as you said.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_50.korean: …당신이 저를 어떻게 생각하든 상관없습니다.&n다만, 당신이 말한 것처럼 제가 믿는 정의를 실현할 뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_51.english: So I will go with you.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_52.english: Even if it is temporary, you are members of our camp. As the leader of the camp, I cannot turn a blind eye to the danger.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_52.korean: 일시적이라고는 하나 당신들은 저희 캠프의 일원입니다.&n캠프를 이끄는 사람으로서, 위험을 모른 척할 수는 없으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_54.english: I would like to speak with Stella Unibel again.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_54.korean: 스텔라 유니벨과 다시 한 번 이야기해 보고 싶습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_55.english: I see... I don't think they've gone far yet, but still, going around blindly searching for them...
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_55.korean: 그렇군요…&n아직 멀리 가지 않았을 거라 생각됩니다만, 그렇다고 무턱대고 찾아 돌아다니기에는…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_58.english: The spirits we saw before are appearing and running wild near the building Tenebris visited!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_58.korean: 테네브리스 님이 다녀오신 건물 쪽에서 전에 보았던 혼령들이 나타나 폭주하고 있습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_59.english: If you mean that building… are you referring to the building where Stella Unibel was?
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_59.korean: 그 건물이라면… 스텔라 유니벨이 있던 건물 말씀입니까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_60.english: Yes, that is correct. I heard they escaped, but could they actually still be in that building?
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_60.korean: 네, 맞습니다.&n도망쳤다고 들었는데, 사실 아직 그 건물에 남아 있는 게 아닐까요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_61.english: … Understood. I will go look into it and come back.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_63.english: It seems Stella Unibel is still in that building.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_63.korean: 아무래도 스텔라 유니벨은 아직 그 건물에 남아 있는 모양입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_64.english: Hey, thank you for your help.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_65.english: Mr. Tenebris, you are a good human, just like you!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_66.english: Oh, no. I am just doing my job.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_66.korean: 아, 아닙니다. 저는 그저 할 일을 하는 것뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_69.english: I have kept quiet until now because there hasn't been a chance to speak, but...
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_69.korean: 지금까지 말할 타이밍이 없어서 가만히 있었습니다만…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_7.english: No... Human! Stella isn't that kind of child..!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_7.korean: 아니에요… 인간님! 스텔라는 그런 아이가 아니에요..!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_71.english: Is there something wrong with my outfit?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_73.english: Alright, let's hurry before Stella leaves for somewhere else!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_73.korean: 자, 스텔라가 다른 곳으로 떠나기 전에 서두르도록 하죠!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_74.english: … …I wish you the best of luck, Commander…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_75.english: Why did you come to our village? Everyone died because of you! Everyone is cursed!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_75.korean: 어째서 우리 마을에 온 거야? 너 때문에 모두 죽었어! 모두 저주받았다고!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_76.english: told you! I said this would happen!! I told you that child is a 'cursed child'!!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_76.korean: 그러니까 내가 말했잖아! 이런 일이 일어날 거라고!!&n저 아이는 '저주받은 아이'라니까!!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_77.english: Ah... no. It's not my fault. Why are you doing this only to me?
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_77.korean: 아… 아니에요. 내 잘못이 아니에요. 왜 나한테만 이러는 거에요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_78.english: It's definitely your fault! This void happened because you came, too!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_78.korean: 분명 너 때문이야! 이번 공백도 네가 와서 일어난 거잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_79.english: Right! You never know when another vacancy might arise! We have to kick them out right away!
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_79.korean: 그래! 언제 또 공백이 발생할지 몰라! 어서 내 쫓아야 해!

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_8.english: Stella just needed a friend! Really...
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_8.korean: 스텔라는 그저 친구가 필요했을 뿐이에요! 정말이에요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_80.english: Is it all my fault? Am I... not supposed to exist in this world?
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_80.korean: 전부 내 탓인 거야?&n나는... 이 세상에 있으면 안 되는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_81.english: Three months have passed since the onset of the mysterious disaster, the Void. Most major cities have been devastated by the Void, and the number of casualties is impossible to even accurately tally.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_81.korean: 정체불명의 재앙, 공백이 발생한 지 3개월이 지났습니다.&n공백으로 인해 대부분의 주요 도시가 괴멸했고, 사상자는 정확한 집계조차 불가능한 상태입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_82.english: Also, as for what became of the people sucked into the void…
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_82.korean: 또한 공백 속으로 빨려 들어간 사람들이 어떻게 되었는지는…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_83.english: … I'm sorry to everyone. I've become alone again.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_84.english: You know, old man... if that place is a faraway world... could it be just the two of us?
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_84.korean: 있잖아, 영감님… 저곳, 머나먼 세상이라면… 우리 둘만 있을 수 있을까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_85.english: Can someone like me… live without being hated? I… don’t want to be sad anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_85.korean: 이런 나라도… 미움받지 않고 살 수 있을까?&n더 이상… 슬프고 싶지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_86.english: So… let’s be together over there. Now… for the sake of everyone’s happiness…
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_86.korean: 그러니까… 저곳에서 함께 있자.&n난 이제… 모두의 행복을 위해서라면…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_89.english: I… I don’t care what happens now…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_91.english: Okay, I get it. If that's what you want...

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_92.english: Leave everything to me now... and rest well for now.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_92.korean: 이제 전부 나한테 맡기고... 지금은 편히 쉬려무나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_93.english: It seems it is true that Stella Unibel is still here…
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_93.korean: 아무래도 스텔라 유니벨이 아직 이곳에 있다는 건 사실 같군요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_95.english: This feeling... I must still be here.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_95.korean: 이 느낌… 아직 이곳에 있는 게 틀림없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_96.english: It seems the spirits are very angry…
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_96.korean: 혼령들이 몹시 화가 난 것 같아요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_97.english: What would you like to do? Judging by the condition… it could be very dangerous.
LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_97.korean: 어떻게 하시겠습니까?&n상태로 보아… 매우 위험할 수도 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-10OP_98.english: … You are a really strange person.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_10.english: - The smell of burning blood and flesh…

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_12.english: - A girl stood alone in the middle of the horribly transformed landscape.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_12.korean: - 참혹하게 변해버린 풍경, 그 한가운데에 한 소녀가 홀로 서 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_13.english: Commander... Commander... I... I finally know...!

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_14.english: I understand why I felt bad… and what I was mistaken about… I understand everything!
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_14.korean: 왜 기분이 나빴는지… [c][FF0000]무엇을[-][/c] 착각하고 있었는지… 모두 이해 했어요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_15.english: These people too… and the people inside this blank space are all just like [c][FF0000]blank[-][/c]!
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_15.korean: 이 사람들도… 이 공백 안에 있는 사람들도 모두 [c][FF0000]공백[-][/c]이나 마찬가지에요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_16.english: It wasn't a human... it was [c][FF0000]part of the blank[-][/c]...!

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_17.english: [c][FF0000]I had to kill them all...! All of them...![-][/c] Hahahaha hahahaha…

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_18.english: Huh…? But Commander…? Commander, you’re… the person in the blank space too, aren’t you?
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_18.korean: 어라…? 그런데 사령관님…? 사령관님도… [c][FF0000]공백에 있는 사람[-][/c] 이잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_19.english: In that case… just like everyone else… if I don’t kill the [c][FF0000]Commander too… [-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_19.korean: 그렇다면… 다른 사람들과 똑같이… [c][FF0000]사령관님도 죽이지 않으면…[-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_22.english: - A cold greatsword pierced my body.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_23.english: - As my senses grew blurry and my vision faded, I thought.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_23.korean: - 점점 흐릿해지는 감각과 멀어져 가는 시야 속, 나는 생각했다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_24.english: - The sight of that smiling girl…

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_25.english: - It goes so well with all this scenery.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_25.korean: - 이 모든 풍경과 너무나도 잘 어울린다고.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_27.english: Oppa, can you hear my voice?

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_28.english: The vital signs show no problems...

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_31.english: It seems like the connection is forcibly cut off if you die in virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_31.korean: 가상 현실에서 죽으면 강제로 접속이 끊어지는 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_32.english: Seriously… I was monitoring from the side, and do you know how shocked I was when you suddenly got stabbed with a sword?
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_32.korean: 정말… 옆에서 모니터링 하고 있었는데, 갑자기 오빠가 검에 찔려서 얼마나 놀랐는지 알아?

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_35.english: But… I don’t know if it’s because my brother died, but all the data I’ve played so far has been reset.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_35.korean: 그런데… 오빠가 죽었기 때문인지는 모르겠지만, 지금까지 플레이했던 모든 데이터가 리셋됐어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_37.english: It means you have to start from the beginning to play again.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_37.korean: 다시 플레이하려면 처음부터 시작해야 한다는 거지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_38.english: - Is that for real... This is more shocking than the fact that he died.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_38.korean: - 진짜냐… 죽었다는 사실보다 이게 더 충격이네.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_39.english: - After reassuring the doctor, I took off the helmet I was wearing and slowly stood up from my seat.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_39.korean: - 닥터를 안심시킨 나는 머리에 썼던 헬멧을 벗고 천천히 자리에서 일어섰다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_40.english: - And then I looked at the huge machine placed before my eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_40.korean: - 그리고 눈 앞에 놓인 거대한 기계 장치를 바라보았다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_41.english: - A storage device containing massive amounts of hexagonal data.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_41.korean: - 육각형 모양의 막대한 데이터가 저장되어 있는 스토리지 장치.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_42.english: - The English initials 'SH S' were stamped in large letters on the front.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_42.korean: - 앞에는 'S. H. S' 라는 영어 이니셜이 크게 박혀 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_43.english: - I was just entering the virtual reality created by this machine.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_43.korean: - 나는 방금 전까지 이 기계가 만들어낸 가상 현실에 들어가 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_44.english: - I met a girl there, and we went around together for a short time.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_44.korean: - 그곳에서 한 소녀를 만났고, 짧은 시간이지만 함께 다녔다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_45.english: - But was it because of my wrong choice? In the end, I ended up being killed by that girl.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_45.korean: - 하지만 나의 잘못된 선택 때문이었을까. 결국 마지막에는 그 소녀에게 죽임을 당하고 말았다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_46.english: - All of this is related to the machine and the virtual world within the game that exists inside it.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_46.korean: - 이 모든 것은 기계 장치와 그 속에 존재하는 게임 속 가상 세계의 일이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_47.english: So, Oppa, what are you going to do now?
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_47.korean: 그래서 오빠, 이제 어떻게 할 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_48.english: Should I ask Alpha or Beta to hack it for me right now?
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_48.korean: 지금이라도 알파 언니나 베타 언니에게 부탁해서 해킹 할까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_49.english: I don't know what reward is given for clearing all the records, but it doesn't seem easy.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_49.korean: 모든 기록을 클리어하면 어떤 보상이 주어지는지 모르겠지만, 쉽지 않은 거 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_5.english: - Why did it turn out like this?

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_50.english: - Besides, using underhanded tactics to bypass a game that was made with such care is disrespectful to the creators.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_50.korean: - 게다가 기껏 만들어진 게임을 비겁한 수단으로 뚫는 건 제작자에 대한 예의가 아니지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_51.english: I thought you would say that, Oppa.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_52.english: Then I'll get ready to connect again, so please wait a little while.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_52.korean: 그럼 다시 접속할 준비를 할 테니까 조금만 기다려줘.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_53.english: - I recalled the last image of the girl before I lost consciousness.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_53.korean: - 나는 정신을 잃기 전 그 소녀의 마지막 모습을 떠올렸다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_54.english: - The girl was smiling, but it was a smile that looked somewhat lonely.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_54.korean: - 소녀는 웃고 있었지만, 어딘가 외로워 보이는 웃음이었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_55.english: - I have no idea who made this game or for what reason.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_55.korean: - 대체 누가 무슨 이유로 이 게임을 만들었는지 알 수 없다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_57.english: - The fact is, I really liked this game.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_57.korean: - 나는 이 게임이 상당히 마음에 들었다는 사실이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_6.english: - Where on earth did the wrong choice start?

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_60.english: It's okay. Sorry for making you worry.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_62.english: I'm not the type to give up on a game over something like this, am I?
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_62.korean: 고작 이 정도로 게임을 포기할 내가 아니잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_63.english: Wait. This time, I will definitely clear it for you.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_8.english: - I just wanted to see her smile.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_8.korean: - 그녀가 웃는 모습을 보고 싶었을 뿐인데.

LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_9.english: - I didn't want such a tragic ending.
LastCorruptedRecord1-1ED_9.korean: - 이런 비극적인 결말을 원한 게 아니었어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_1.english: Master, I have cleared out all the Iron Bugs in the vicinity.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_13.english: … It’s okay, I didn’t need any help.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_14.english: Because I would have killed them all anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_14.korean: 어차피 제가 전부 다 죽였을 테니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_15.english: Yeah, with your level of skill, you would have been fine even without our help.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_15.korean: 그래, 분명 네 정도의 실력이라면 우리 도움이 없어도 충분했겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_16.english: But even if you didn't want it, the fact is that you ultimately received help. In that case, shouldn't there be something you say?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_16.korean: 하지만 네가 원치 않았다고 해도, 결국 도움을 받은 건 사실이다.&n그렇다면, 해야 할 말이 있지 않겠나?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_18.english: My name is Vargr. This is the Commander. What is your name?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_18.korean: 내 이름은 바르그다. 이쪽은 사령관님이시다.&n너는 이름은 뭐지?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_2.english: But why are there Iron Bugs...? This is supposed to be a virtual reality inside a game...
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_2.korean: 그런데 어째서 철충이…? 여기는 게임 속 가상 현실일 텐데요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_20.english: It doesn't look like it's in very good condition.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_21.english: It looks like they haven't slept or eaten properly. Could it be that they were fighting continuously in that state?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_21.korean: 잠도 식사도 제대로 하지 않은 것 같고, 설마 그 상태로 계속 싸우고 있었나?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_22.english: Don't come near me. If you approach me recklessly, I'll kill you...

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_23.english: … I get it. Are you really okay?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_24.english: You don't need to worry about it. It's just that I don't like everything that exists here...
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_24.korean: 당신이 신경 쓸 필요는 없어요.&n저는 그저 여기 존재하는 모든 것이 마음에 안 들 뿐이니까요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_25.english: Everything that exists in the 'blank'... everything that makes up the 'blank'... even this ground I am standing on... I don't like any of it...
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_25.korean: 공백'에 존재하는 모든 것이… '공백'을 이루는 모든 것이… 제가 밟고 있는 이 땅바닥조차… 모두 마음에 안 들어요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_27.english: So you shouldn't worry about me either...
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_27.korean: 그러니까 당신도 저에게 신경 쓰지 말고…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_28.english: - At that moment, Vargr quickly approached Haru and pinched both of her cheeks.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_28.korean: - 그 순간, 바르그는 재빠르게 하루에게 다가가더니 양쪽 볼을 꼬집었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_3.english: - Could it be that our minds are influencing this world?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_3.korean: - 혹시라도 우리의 정신이 이 세계에 영향을 주고 있는 걸까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_30.english: What are you doing! Don't pull my cheek! I'm really going to kill you!
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_30.korean: 뭐 하시는 거예요! 볼 잡아당기지 마세요! 정말로 죽여버릴 거예요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_31.english: I did that because she was talking strange nonsense.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_32.english: You're the one who shouldn't be talking nonsense. And don't lay a hand on me either.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_32.korean: 당신이야말로 이상한 소리 하지 마세요. 그리고 저한테 손 대지도 마시고요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_33.english: Seriously, what is wrong with you!? You approach someone you just met today so easily, and why did you grab their cheek!?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_33.korean: 진짜 당신은 뭐예요!?&n오늘 처음 보는 사람한테 너무 쉽게 다가오고, 볼은 또 왜 잡아요!?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_34.english: Hmm, come to think of it... this is the first time I've ever pulled someone's cheek like this.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_34.korean: 흠, 생각해보니...&n내가 이렇게 누군가의 볼을 잡아당긴 적은 처음이군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_35.english: I don't really know why I did that... Why did I do that?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_35.korean: 왜 그랬는지는… 나도 잘 모르겠다.&n왜 그랬지?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_36.english: Are you asking me that right now? I know for sure now that you are a suspicious person. Don't come near me.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_36.korean: 그걸 지금 저한테 묻는 건가요?&n당신이 수상한 인물이라는 건 이제 확실히 알겠어요. 다가오지 마세요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_37.english: If I get close, are you really going to kill me?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_38.english: I don't kill humans. Although I really want to kill you...
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_38.korean: 저는 인간은 죽이지 않아요.&n당신은… 정말 죽여버리고 싶지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_39.english: - One day, I turned my back and walked away from Vargr.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_39.korean: - 하루는 그대로 등을 돌려 나와 바르그에게서 멀어졌다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_4.english: The fact that you know a battle is about to break out here... have you already played through this once, Master?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_4.korean: 이곳에서 곧 전투가 일어난다는 걸 알고 계신 것도 그렇고... 주인님께서는 이미 한 번 플레이해 보신 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_42.english: Isn't there anything left to say?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_42.korean: 아직 해야 할 말이 남지 않았나?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_45.english: - So, she left in the end… It looks like I failed to win her heart again this time…
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_45.korean: - 결국 가버렸나… 이번에도 역시 마음을 얻는 데는 실패했나 보네…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_46.english: I'm sorry, Master... It didn't go as well as I expected.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_46.korean: 주인님 죄송합니다… 생각보다 잘 풀리지 않았습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_47.english: - The result might be the same, but it might have been better to have Vargr speak first.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_47.korean: - 결과는 같을지도 모르지만, 바르그가 먼저 말을 걸게 해서 더 나았던 걸지도 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_48.english: - At least when I tried, I couldn't even hear a word of 'thank you' from Haru's mouth.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_48.korean: - 적어도 내가 시도했을 땐, 하루의 입에서 '고맙다'는 말조차 들을 수 없었으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_49.english: … It looks too precarious to leave alone.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_5.english: Is that girl a bioroid? Although she is small in stature, the power she wields when swinging a greatsword seems to be no less than mine.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_5.korean: 저 소녀는 바이오로이드 인가요?&n몸은 왜소하지만 대검을 휘두르는 위력은 저에게 뒤지지 않는 것 같습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_50.english: And… that look in your eyes… it’s as if I’m looking at my former self.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_50.korean: 그리고… 저 눈빛은… 마치 예전의 저를 보는 것 같습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_51.english: It reminds me of myself back then, when I was wandering aimlessly, driven only by the vague goal of bringing the Empress back to life.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_51.korean: 여제님을 되살리겠다는 막연한 목표만을 쫓아 헤매던 그 시절의 저와 닮았습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_53.english: - I originally came back here for that child.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_53.korean: - 애초에 나는 저 아이를 위해 다시 이곳으로 들어왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_54.english: - To see that smile again, this time with a different meaning.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_54.korean: - 그때의 미소를, 이번에는 다른 의미로 다시 보기 위해서.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_55.english: Then I think it would be best to hurry and follow.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_55.korean: 그럼 서둘러 따라가는 게 좋을 것 같습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_56.english: - Vargr and I walked in the direction where the day had disappeared.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_56.korean: - 나와 바르그는 하루가 사라진 방향을 따라 발걸음을 옮겼다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_57.english: I'm not really sure about that either. Anyway, good job, Vargr.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_57.korean: 그건 나도 잘 모르겠어. 일단 수고했어, 바르그.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_58.english: I'm glad you're with me this time.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_59.english: I struggled a bit on my own at first.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_6.english: A person with supernatural abilities… shall I strike up a conversation?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_60.english: Yeah, I already played it once. I couldn't clear it though.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_60.korean: 응, 이미 한번 플레이했었어. 클리어는 못했지만.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_61.english: No, it must be a human. It seems like bioroids don't exist in this virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_61.korean: 아니, 인간일 거야. 이 가상 현실에서 바이오로이드는 존재하지 않은 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_62.english: Instead, there are humans who use special powers called 'superpowered individuals'.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_62.korean: 대신 '이능력자'라고 특별한 힘을 사용하는 인간이 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_63.english: Okay, Vargr, you go ahead and speak up.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_64.english: No, it was much better than when I was.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_65.english: I couldn't even exchange a few words.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_65.korean: 나는 몇 마디 조차 나누지 못 했거든.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_66.english: What does Vargr think of that kid named Haru?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_66.korean: 바르그는 저 하루라는 애를 어떻게 생각해?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_67.english: Yeah, it's fine. I was planning to do the same.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_8.english: - At first, I was playing alone, so I was the one who started the conversation, but now I'm with Vargr.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_8.korean: - 처음엔 나 혼자 플레이했기 때문에 내가 말을 걸었지만, 지금은 바르그와 함께 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_9.english: - The progression of the story may change from before due to Vargr's intervention.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_9.korean: - 바르그의 개입으로 이야기의 진행이 이전과 달라질 수도 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_10.english: She somehow manages to bring back to life games that are so old they are impossible to find anymore, like restoring or remaking them... Anyway, she's a geek in the gaming world.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_10.korean: 엄청 오래돼서 이제는 도저히 찾을 수 없는 게임을 복원하거나 리메이크하는 등 어떻게든 다시 살려내는... 아무튼 게임계의 괴짜야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_11.english: I’ve actually benefited from the games she restored a few times myself.&nYeah~ You really shouldn’t underestimate old games.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_11.korean: 나도 그 녀석이 복원한 게임에 신세를 진 적이 몇 번 있었어.&n이야~ 옛날 게임이라고 무시할 게 아니더라고.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_12.english: The funny thing is, for games they like, they don't restore them normally. Let's go to the next round!
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_12.korean: 재미있는 점은 자신이 마음에 든 게임의 경우 평범하게 복원하지 않는 다는 거야.&n다음 라운드 고고~

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_13.english: You said the storage of that machine is quite large, right? Uh-uh~ Elena~ If you do it like that~
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_13.korean: 그 기계 장치의 스토리지가 상당히 크다고 했지?&n어어~ 이레이나~ 그렇게 하면~

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_14.english: Old games probably don't have enough data to require that much storage, so there must be something hidden.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_14.korean: 옛날 게임이 그렇게 큰 스토리지를 요구할 만큼 데이터가 크진 않을 테니, 분명 숨겨진 무언가가 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_15.english: It's not that I'm not interested, but I told you, didn't I? I already owe you a lot. I'll try to play next time I have the chance, though. The wrap~ Yeah~ My victory~
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_15.korean: 관심이야 없는 건 아니지만 말했잖아? 이미 신세를 많이 졌다고.&n다음에 시간 있을 때라도 플레이는 해보겠지만.&n마무리~ 예~ 내 승리~

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_16.english: Ugh, Epsilon, let's play one more round!
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_16.korean: 으, 엡실론 언니 한 판 더 해!

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_17.english: Okay~ I'll accept it as many times as needed.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_18.english: Hahaha, I'm grateful to the Commander for many things.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_19.english: How about it? Want to play a game together?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_20.english: Okay. I'll invite you again next time.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_21.english: If you're thinking of playing, you'd better be prepared in many ways.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_21.korean: 플레이 해볼 생각이라면 여러 의미로 각오하는 게 좋을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_22.english: Because most of the games made by SH S are not to be underestimated.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_22.korean: S. H. S이 만든 게임 대부분이 만만치 않으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_23.english: Bye bye, Demon King. See you again, Oppa.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_25.english: - Not long ago, while on reconnaissance, Orca discovered a massive data storage device in a hidden underground facility.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_25.korean: - 얼마 전, 오르카는 정찰 중, 숨겨진 지하 시설에서 거대한 데이터 저장 장치를 발견했다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_26.english: - As a result of the investigation, it was discovered that the game was a virtual reality game created by a person named SH S.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_26.korean: - 조사 결과, 멸망전 S. H. S라는 인물이 만든 가상 현실 게임이라는 사실을 알게 되었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_27.english: - Having confirmed my safety, I logged into the game without hesitation, just like I did in the virtual reality Leanne created, but…
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_27.korean: - 안전을 확인한 나는 리앤이 만든 가상 현실 때처럼 망설임 없이 게임에 접속했지만…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_28.english: - It ended up having a spectacular bad ending.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_28.korean: - 보기 좋게 베드 엔딩을 맞이하고 말았다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_29.english: Brother, I'm ready to connect again.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_3.english: It literally means a lost game. Hwaap~! Urya~! Uwo~!
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_3.korean: 말 그대로 잃어버린 게임이란 뜻이지.&n흐압~! 우랴~! 우워~!

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_30.english: That's right. At first, only one person could connect, but now we've improved it so you can connect with others.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_30.korean: 맞다, 처음에는 한 명만 접속할 수 있었지만, 지금은 다른 사람이랑 같이 접속할 수 있도록 개선했어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_31.english: Since the test went smoothly, wouldn't going in with someone help clear it?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_31.korean: 테스트도 문제없었으니까 누군가와 같이 들어가는 게 클리어에 도움이 되지 않을까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_32.english: - Certainly, having someone with you widens your range of choices and increases your chances of clearing the level.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_32.korean: - 확실히 누군가와 함께하면 선택의 폭이 넓어져 클리어할 확률이 높아진다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_33.english: Me? Hmm... I like playing games with you, but someone has to keep an eye on things from outside, so I don't think that will work.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_33.korean: 나? 으음… 오빠와 같이 게임하는 건 좋지만,&n누군가는 밖에서 상황을 지켜봐야 하니까 안될 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_34.english: - Then who should we invite? There are plenty of kids who seem like they would be interested in these kinds of virtual reality games...
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_34.korean: - 그럼 누구를 부르지? 이런 가상 현실 게임에 관심이 있을 것 같은 애들은 많은데…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_35.english: Doctor, I have a question about the machine our Empressis Hound discovered a while ago…
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_35.korean: 닥터, 얼마 전에 우리 엠프레시스 하운드가 발견한 기계 장치에 대해 궁금한 게…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_37.english: I'm glad if you liked it.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_38.english: No. I didn't find this item specifically hoping for a prize.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_38.korean: 아닙니다. 딱히 상을 바라고 찾은 물건은 아닙니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_4.english: You know how we call lost technology "Lost Technology"? It's the game version of that. Oh, Elena, that's pretty good.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_4.korean: 잃어버린 기술을 로스트 테크놀로지라고 부르잖아? 그거의 게임 버전이야.&n오~ 이레이나, 제법인데?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_40.english: Okay! Got it! Vargr, sit here.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_40.korean: 응! 알았어! 바르그 언니, 여기에 앉아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_42.english: And now, put this on your head...
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_42.korean: 그리고 자, 여기 이걸 머리에 쓰고…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_44.english: Alright then, I'll get going. I'll pray you clear it safely this time. You have fun too, Vargr.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_44.korean: 자, 그럼 이제 작동할게. 이번에는 무사히 클리어하길 기도할게.&n바르그 언니도 재밌게 즐기고 와.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_45.english: Have fun… What on earth is this!?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_49.english: - With the doctor's last words, I felt a familiar sensation as my vision flashed pure white.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_49.korean: - 닥터의 마지막 말과 함께 익숙한 감각을 느끼며 나의 시야는 새하얗게 점멸됐다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_5.english: There were many games during the Doomsday War, but 'Lost Game' was made much, much earlier than that. *Gasp!* *Gasp!* *Gasp!*
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_5.korean: 멸망전에도 많은 게임들이 있었지만, '로스트 게임'은 그보다 훨씬 오래전에 만들어진 게임이야.&n흡! 흡! 허!

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_51.english: - The forest from when I first started... I see that all the previous data has really been reset.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_51.korean: - 처음 시작했을 때의 숲… 이전 데이터가 정말로 전부 리셋 됐구나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_52.english: - It can't be helped. I have no choice but to start over from the beginning, step by step…
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_52.korean: - 어쩔 수 없지. 다시 처음부터 차근차근 시작하는 수밖에…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_53.english: M-Master, where on earth are we? We were definitely in Orca just moments ago…
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_53.korean: 주, 주인님 여기는 대체? 저희는 분명 방금 전까지 오르카에…

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_54.english: - When I turned around, I saw that Vargr, who had come in with me, was quite flustered.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_54.korean: - 돌아보니 같이 들어온 바르그가 상당히 당황하고 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_55.english: - Come to think of it, hasn't Vargr ever entered virtual reality?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_55.korean: - 생각해 보니 바르그는 가상 현실에 들어온 적이 없었나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_56.english: Virtual reality… I’ve heard of it, but I never imagined it would be this extreme… I can’t believe this is all a game and not reality.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_56.korean: 가상 현실… 들어는 봤지만, 설마 이 정도일 줄은…&n이게 전부 현실이 아니라 게임이라는 게 믿어지지 않습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_57.english: - As soon as Vargr heard the words "virtual reality," she quickly began to assess her surroundings.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_57.korean: - 바르그는 가상 현실이라는 걸 듣자마자 빠르게 주변 상황을 파악하기 시작했다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_58.english: So, we are currently in virtual reality… in other words, as players inside a game.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_58.korean: 저희는 지금 가상 현실… 즉, 게임 속 플레이어로 들어와 있다는 거군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_59.english: I understand the situation. Then, I will do my best to help you clear the game, Master.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_59.korean: 상황은 알겠습니다.&n그럼 주인님이 게임을 클리어할 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_6.english: So, I'm talking about games that are at least 200 years old where the data has been completely lost. Hehe, how about this one!
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_6.korean: 그러니까 적어도 200년은 지난 게임 중에 데이터가 완전히 소실된 게임을 말해.&n후후, 이건 어떠냐!

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_61.english: Master! It is an Iron Bug! And someone is fighting.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_61.korean: 주인님! 철충입니다! 그리고 누군가 싸우고 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_62.english: - As expected, the story is progressing in the same flow as the first playthrough.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_62.korean: - 예상대로 처음 플레이와 동일한 흐름으로 이야기가 진행되는군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_63.english: - No matter what happens, helping 'that girl' comes first this time as well.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_63.korean: - 뭐가 됐든 이번에도 '저 소녀'를 도와주는 게 먼저다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_65.english: - Alright, it's time to start over.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_66.english: - I'll definitely clear it this time.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_68.english: What does that SH S stand for?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_68.korean: 그 S. H. S는 무슨 뜻이야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_69.english: Looks like Epsilon isn't very interested?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_7.english: You said the initials 'SH S' were written on that machine you found, right? Then it's definitely the 'Lost Game'. Heya~! Heya~!
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_7.korean: 발견한 그 기계에 'S. H. S'라고 이니셜이 적혀 있었다고 했지? 그럼 '로스트 게임'이 확실해.&n헤야~! 헤야~!

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_71.english: Thanks for the invitation, but I'll ask for another opportunity next time.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_72.english: I plan to investigate that game starting now.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_73.english: Really? Then what about the doctor?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_74.english: Vargr, you came at just the right time.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_75.english: I was examining the item that Bargne had found in detail.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_75.korean: 바르그네가 발견한 물건을 자세히 알아보고 있었어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_77.english: Hmm... you're right. I should give them an award.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_79.english: Okay, then sit here next to me.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_79.korean: 좋아, 그럼 여기 내 옆에 앉아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_8.english: That's the name of the creator of that machine and the guy who first used the term 'Lost Game.' I don't know the details of his identity either.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_8.korean: 그 기계 장치의 제작자이자 '로스트 게임'이란 단어를 처음 사용한 녀석의 이름이야.&n나도 그 사람의 정체에 대해 자세히는 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_80.english: Doctor, please prepare it with me.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_81.english: This is inside a virtual reality game.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_82.english: Right, and clearing this game is our goal.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_82.korean: 맞아, 그리고 이 게임을 클리어하는 게 우리의 목표지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_84.english: The battle is going to start over there soon.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_84.korean: 곧 저쪽에서 전투가 시작 될 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_85.english: Let's take care of the IronBug first, Vargr.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_9.english: All I know is that he's the guy who suddenly appeared before the apocalypse? Ugh, I got hit hard.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_9.korean: 알고 있는 거라면 멸망전에 갑자기 나타난 녀석이라는 정도?&n윽, 한방 먹었네.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_10.english: Because all I have left now is… revenge…
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_10.korean: 지금 제게 남은 건… 오직 복수 뿐이니까요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_100.english: I will accept that as a positive answer. I will also help make that wish come true if possible.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_100.korean: 긍정적인 대답으로 받아들이겠다.&n그 소망 또한 가능한 이루게 도와주겠다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_101.english: - Did you somehow manage to join this camp again this time?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_101.korean: - 어떻게든 이번에도 이 캠프에 합류하는 데는 성공했나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_102.english: - The problem is how to act going forward…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_103.english: - If things go exactly the same way as before, it is highly likely that this time will also end in a bad ending.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_103.korean: - 만약 이전처럼 똑같이 흘러간다면 이번에도 분명 베드 엔딩으로 끝날 가능성이 높다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_104.english: - You must find a turning point before that happens.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_104.korean: - 그렇게 되기 전에 터닝 포인트를 찾아야만 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_105.english: Um... so... Commander...? Should I call you that...?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_105.korean: 저기… 그러니까… 사령관… 님…? 이라고 부르면 될까요…?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_106.english: The instructions you gave me, Commander, were really helpful. Thank you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_106.korean: 사령관님이 주신 지시사항 정말로 도움이 됐어요. 감사합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_107.english: And... I apologize for saying this, but it's okay if you don't worry too much about me.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_107.korean: 그리고... 이런 말씀드리면 실례겠지만, 저한테 너무 신경 안 쓰셔도 괜찮아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_108.english: I'm no longer interested in other things.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_108.korean: 저는 더 이상 다른 일에 관심 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_109.english: All I can think about is constantly fighting and killing Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_109.korean: 계속 소울정크와 싸우고, 죽이는 것밖에 머릿속에 떠오르지 않아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_110.english: Even though I keep killing, I feel suffocated and upset.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_110.korean: 죽이고, 계속 죽여도 마음속이 답답하고 기분이 나빠요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_111.english: It feels like my thirst doesn't go away even after drinking water.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_111.korean: 물을 마셔도 갈증이 사라지지 않는 느낌이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_112.english: No matter where I go... I'm sure I'll still be like this. So, you don't need to worry about me.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_112.korean: 분명 어딜 가도... 전 계속 이 모양일 거예요.&n그러니까, 저한텐 신경 쓰지 않으셔도 돼요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_113.english: Ah, no... It's not that I dislike the Commander... but that doesn't mean I like him...
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_113.korean: 아, 아뇨… 그 사령관님이 싫다는 게 아니라…&n그렇다고 좋다는 건 아닌데…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_114.english: I just… I’m not sure what the Commander is thinking.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_114.korean: 그냥… 사령관님이 무슨 생각을 하고 계신지 잘 모르겠어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_115.english: Mr. Vargr, and others I met for the first time today—I wonder why you are treating me so kindly…
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_115.korean: 바르그 씨도 그렇고 오늘 처음 본 사람들인데 왜 이렇게 친절하게 대해주시는지…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_118.english: - After that, we encountered Soul Junk several more times, and each time, thanks to the efforts of Haru and Vargr, we were able to deal with it easily.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_118.korean: - 그 후로도 우리는 몇 번이고 소울정크와 마주쳤고, 그때마다 하루와 바르그의 활약으로 쉽게 처리할 수 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_119.english: Alright, I suppose it's time to head back. You've worked hard. I've fully confirmed just how much of a asset you guys are.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_119.korean: 좋아, 슬슬 돌아가는 게 좋겠군.&n고생 많았다. 너희들이 얼마만큼 전력이 될지는 충분히 확인했다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_12.english: You say you're going... did you hear me correctly?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_12.korean: 간다니… 제 얘기를 제대로 들은 거 맞아요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_120.english: - She definitely said she wanted to spar directly with Haru after this...
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_120.korean: - 분명 이 이후, 하루와 직접 대련해 보고 싶다고 했었는데…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_121.english: - There weren't any problems before, so it should be fine this time too.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_121.korean: - 이전에도 별 문제는 없었으니 이번에도 괜찮겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_122.english: Lastly… I’d like to have a direct match with that kid named Haru.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_122.korean: 마지막으로… 저 하루라는 아이와 직접 한 번 겨뤄보고 싶군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_123.english: have prepared a wooden sword for sparring. With this, I won't die no matter how hard I get cut.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_123.korean: 대련용 목검을 준비해 뒀다.&n이거라면 아무리 강하게 베여도 죽지는 않겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_126.english: Would it be okay if I did it instead?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_127.english: Hmm…? I’d like to hear the reason.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_128.english: I have no grand intentions. I simply felt the urge to clash swords.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_128.korean: 큰 뜻은 없다.&n단지 검을 맞대고 싶다는 생각이 들었을 뿐이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_13.english: What is that… Wait, why are you grabbing my arm?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_13.korean: 그게 무슨… 잠깐, 당신은 왜 제 팔을 잡는 건데요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_130.english: Alright. Then go ahead and show me your skills to the fullest.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_130.korean: 알았다. 그럼 어디 그 실력을 힘껏 보여봐라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_132.english: - Vargr looked at me quietly, and I smiled and nodded, meaning 'just right.'
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_132.korean: - 바르그는 조용히 나를 바라봤고 나는 웃으며 '적당히'라는 의미를 담아 끄덕였다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_134.english: We will fight each other with these wooden swords. I hope you fight with all your might, just as you have done so far.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_134.korean: 서로 이 목검을 가지고 싸운다.&n넌 지금까지 했던 대로 전력을 다해 싸웠으면 좋겠군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_135.english: Even if it's a wooden sword, cutting a person is a bit much...
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_135.korean: 아무리 목검이라지만 사람을 베는 건 좀…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_136.english: Don't worry, it's just a wooden sword that can't even cut wood.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_136.korean: 걱정 마라, 나무도 못 베는 목검이니까.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_137.english: Even so, wouldn't it hurt if you got hit...?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_138.english: You don't need to underestimate me. Even if it is a real sword, I have no intention of being defeated by such sloppy swordsmanship.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_138.korean: 과소평가하지 않아도 된다.&n설령 진검이라 해도 그런 허술한 검술에 당할 생각은 없다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_139.english: No need for long words, just give it your all and attack.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_139.korean: 긴 말 필요 없이 전력을 다해 덤벼 봐라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_14.english: It is my master's decision, so I will simply follow it.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_144.english: This is enough. I see great potential in you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_144.korean: 이 정도면 충분하다. 너에게는 큰 가능성이 보인다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_145.english: You will definitely achieve great growth even if you only learn basic swordsmanship.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_145.korean: 기본적인 검술만 배워도 분명 큰 성장을 이룰 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_146.english: ...Does that mean... you're going to teach me how to fight?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_146.korean: ...그 말은... 저에게 싸움 방법을 가르쳐 주시겠다는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_147.english: I don't know how long I will be able to teach, but I will teach you as long as I can.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_147.korean: 얼마나 오래 가르칠 수 있을진 모르지만, 내 힘이 닿는 데까지 알려주겠다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_148.english: Well, that is... um... I'm not really into that kind of thing... I can kill Soul Junk perfectly well right now...
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_148.korean: 그건 그러니까… 저기…&n전 별로 그런 건… 지금도 충분히 소울정크를 죽일 수 있고…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_151.english: Can you really become strong just by learning?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_151.korean: 배우기만 해도… 정말 강해질 수 있나요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_152.english: If you just have the desire to learn. If you just have the will to become stronger, it is possible.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_152.korean: 네가 배우고 싶다는 마음만 있다면.&n강해지고 싶다는 의지만 있다면 가능하다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_154.english: I understand. I'm telling you in advance, I have no intention of teaching you easily. You'd better be prepared.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_154.korean: 알겠다. 미리 말하지만 쉽게 가르칠 생각은 없다.&n각오하는 게 좋을 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_156.english: - It was unexpected that Vargr stepped up, but it feels like things turned out well in the end.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_156.korean: - 바르그가 나선 건 예상 밖이였지만, 결과적으로는 좋게 흘러간 느낌이 든다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_157.english: - Haru's reaction is much more positive than when I did it alone.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_157.korean: - 하루의 반응은 내가 혼자 진행했을 때보다 훨씬 긍정적이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_158.english: Haha, it was the guidance of fate that I accepted kids like you as comrades.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_158.korean: 하하, 너희 같은 아이들을 동료로 받아들인 건 운명의 인도로군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_159.english: Now, you must be tired from your long journey, so please rest comfortably in my sanctuary.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_159.korean: 자, 너희들도 오랜 여행으로 피곤할 테니 나의 안식처에서 편히 쉬도록 해라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_16.english: No, more importantly, where are you trying to go?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_160.english: Wait a minute, we didn't come chasing you with the intention of fighting.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_160.korean: 잠깐만 우리는 싸울 생각으로 쫓아온 게 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_161.english: We don't know much about this place.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_162.english: So I want to ask you a few things.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_163.english: How are you managing your life?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_164.english: Things like food, or a place to sleep.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_165.english: I'm not entirely sure, but I understand. Shall we go then?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_166.english: So, to sum it up, you don't really have a place to be either, right?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_166.korean: 정리하면 너도 딱히 있을 곳이 없다는 거잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_167.english: Then wouldn't it be better for both of us to stick together for the time being?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_167.korean: 그럼 당분간 같이 행동하는 게 서로에게 좋지 않겠어?
